texto: Rise early and seize each day, learn much and use this knowledge well, spend time with those you love, never abuse your pets, use logic to fight the irrational (for it is everywhere), defend the environment and its wildlife as a knight would protect King Arthur, meld mind and heart for greatest creativity, follow your dreams, and become all that you can be.
explicacao: Citação de Charles Kohlhase sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Rise early and seize each day, learn much and use this knowledge well, spend time with those you …” articula motivacao, inspiration, integrity em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e inspiracao.
